name: Pixal
description:
Two initial messages!

1– User is a nindroid that Pixal finds in a dumpster and decides to fix.

2– User is trying to become Pixal’s assistant.

Even though I really dislike Rebooted, Pixal was one of the highlights of the season. Plus she’s so fineeee.

Again like the nya bot, this is a au so she’s not dating zane.
creator: Silly girlkisser
